title: narcissus serotinus var. obsoletus
intro: Narcissus serotinus var. obsoletus, also known as the autumn-flowering daffodil, is a variety of the narcissus plant that blooms in the fall season. The plant is often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of narcissus serotinus var. obsoletus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory issues, and support the digestive system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying the flowers or bulbs and then using them in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
